allow: PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/shop" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object StatusCode; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/admin" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object StatusCode)

PowerShell(cd C:\\Projects\\bohubrihi; $p = Start-Process python -ArgumentList "app.py" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Host "PID: $\($p.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:5000/admin/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 6; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })
